description: Psychological profiles: spender, saver, risk-taker, analytical, impulser

items.name: Spender (loves deals, discount-driven)
items.sell_to: Urgency, scarcity, time-limited. Price-sensitive but action-fast.

items.name: Saver (cautious, needs proof)
items.sell_to: Money-back guarantee, testimonials, ROI calculation. Time-patient.

items.name: Risk-taker (early adopter, FOMO)
items.sell_to: Exclusive access, limited spots, new feature first. Excitement, status.

items.name: Analytical (numbers matter)
items.sell_to: Data, comparison, specs, case studies. No emotions, facts only.
